description: Automatically request customer reviews after service completion, routing satisfied customers to Google Business Profile and dissatisfied customers to private feedback form

trigger.description: Triggered when a service job is marked as complete in the system

workflow_steps.description: Configurable delay before sending review request
Professional email with star rating preview and instructions
Short SMS with direct Google review link
Customer selects rating (1-5 stars) in email/SMS link
Happy customers (4-5 stars) → Google review link; Unhappy customers (1-3 stars) → Private feedback form
Mark review request as completed, store rating, log feedback
If no response after X days, send follow-up reminder (optional)

delay_after_completion_hours.description: Hours to wait after job completion before sending review request

channels.description: Channels to use for review requests

happy_threshold.description: Star rating threshold for routing to Google (4-5 stars happy, 1-3 unhappy)

unhappy_threshold.description: Star rating threshold for routing to private feedback (below this = unhappy)

max_requests_per_customer.description: Maximum review requests to send per customer in 30 days

follow_up_if_no_response_days.description: Days before sending follow-up if no response (0 to disable)

google_business_profile_url.description: Your Google Business Profile URL for review links

private_feedback_form_url.description: Private feedback form URL for unhappy customers

review_request_email.name: Review Request Email
review_request_email.subject: How did we do? {{customer_first_name}}, share your feedback
review_request_email.description: Professional email with star rating preview and direct links

negative_feedback_redirect.name: Negative Feedback Redirect
negative_feedback_redirect.description: Thank you email acknowledging negative rating, directing to private form

thank_you_for_review.name: Thank You for Review
thank_you_for_review.description: Thank you email after review submission

compliance.description: Reviews must not be incentivized per Google Business Profile guidelines

required_setup: Private feedback form URL (or use built-in form)

scenarios: Job completion triggers review request after delay
Happy customer rating (5 stars) routes to Google
Unhappy customer rating (2 stars) routes to feedback form
Opt-out customer does not receive requests
